title: 188 Pcs Screws And Wall Plugs Set, Anchor Bolts Assorted,Heavy Duty Rawlplug Mixed Sizes Assortment(M5/6/8/10),Fasteners For Brick,Masonry,Plasterboard Fixings,Tv Bracket,Plaster
features: 【High-quality materials】：The expansion anchor is made of high-quality PE material, fine manufacturing, injection moulding in one go, flexible, not easy to break, can provide strong support, matching galvanised screws, carbon steel galvanised process, corrosion-resistant, rust-resistant, durable;

【Kit contains】： The kit contains expansion anchor and supporting screws a total of 188 pcs, of which 4 pieces of M10 * 50 expansion anchor and 4 pieces of M6 * 50 socket head cap screws, 15 pieces of M8 * 40 expansion anchor and 15 pcs M5 * 40 self-tapping screws, 50 pieces of M6 * 30 expansion anchor and 50 pcs M3.5 * 30 self-tapping screws, 25 pcs M5 * 25 expansion anchor and 25 pcs M3 * 25 self-tapping screws. meet your diversified needs.

【Product features】：Expansion anchor front section with serrated design, bite force, enhance the strong anchoring force, not easy to loosen, the side of the double-wing design, to avoid fixing, to prevent the expansion of the anchor to follow the turn, increase friction, improve the fastening performance; a variety of sizes, to meet different needs;

【Installation steps】：When using, first use the drill bit to drill holes at the marked points, the depth of the drill hole needs to be a little longer than the length of the expansion anchor, then hammer the plastic wall anchor into the hole, place the fixed parts, and use a screwdriver to screw the self-tapping screws (or hexagonal screws) into the wall anchor for fixing, convenient and quick;

【Widely used】：Wall plug anchor screw combination, strong fastening ability, can be used for solid bricks, concrete, lime-sand bricks, high-pored bricks and other wall materials. It is very suitable for installing and fixing bathroom hardware, kitchen tools, electrical equipment, shelves, lamps, mirrors, photo frames, curtains, decorations, TV brackets, hooks, etc.

【Storage And Service】: Storage is convenient, all products are stored in a plastic packaging box to prevent children from swallowing and scratching by mistake. It is also convenient for your access. If you have any questions, please contact us in time, we will provide you with services as soon as possible, hope you like the products we provide.
description: Detailed Description: Product type: 4 types of expansion anchors and 4 types of screws Material: PE plastic, galvanised carbon steel Colour: Greyish blue and gold Quantity: 188 pcs Specification: Expansion Anchor M5 *25mm ----------------------------- 25pcs M6 *30mm ----------------------------- 50pcs M8 *40mm ----------------------------- 15pcs M10 *50mm ----------------------------- 4pcs Self-tapping screws M3 *25mm ----------------------------- 25pcs M3.5 *30mm --------------------------- 50pcs M5 *40mm ----------------------------- 15pcs M6 *50mm ----------------------------- 4pcs (Hexagon socket head cap screws) Warm reminder: 1. Due to the production batch and manual measurement, there will be small differences, please understand; 2.
